changes.description: Added hideTvFrame?: boolean to Screen interface and set hideTvFrame: true on 16 screens (gmn-feud-kickoff through post-credits)
Changed zoomedIn logic from screen.bg !== 'crt' to screen.hideTvFrame === true
Modified --surface variable from solid #18181b to rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.8) for 80% opacity

changesImplemented.assetNote: Need 3 new assets: (1) bachelor-mansion-bg.webp - mansion without Steve/roses, (2) steve-character.png - transparent PNG, (3) rose-overlay.png - foreground roses. Plus code changes to ScreenPlayer for foreground overlay support.
changesImplemented.fixDescription: The bachelor-roses screen renders bachelor-mansion.webp as a single flattened background. Steve and roses are baked into one composite - no separate PNG layers exist. ScreenPlayer only supports: (1) single bg image, (2) optional video, (3) ambient particle effects. To achieve Steve behind roses, need separate assets and code changes for foreground overlay support.

layerStructure.notes: bachelor-mansion.webp (currently has Steve + roses baked in)
VideoBackground component - not used on this screen
